GoalOS AGIJobManagerProof-Settlement Lifecycle Console
HomeFlight DeckTrust EquationEvidence DocketLegal BoundaryInstitution
Browser-local settlement rail · public-safe · simulated only

No proof bundle,
no settlement.

This console turns the AGIJobManager settlement rail into a live demonstration: request the work, bound the escrow posture, execute under scope, emit a ProofBundle, replay, validate, hold disputes, then stop at human review before Chronicle memory.

Request → Escrow → Execute → Proof → Validate → Settle → Chronicle
No ProofBundle, no settlement. No replay, no settlement. No authority, no autonomy.

Do not enter personal, confidential, regulated, customer, wallet, seed, or private-key information. This is a local public-safe simulator; it does not connect a wallet, approve tokens, broadcast transactions, certify facts, move funds, or grant production authority.

Settlement readiness
0
readiness
Verdict · Awaiting proof gatesWork index · 0Human review required
Scenario presets
Lifecycle signals
Gate console
Lifecycle readinesslive

A readiness score is advisory; hard gates still control settlement.

Settlement lawStop if missing proof

The simulator blocks settlement when proof, replay, authority, or dispute clearance fail.
